practice.name: Problem 15 (2026 AMC 8)
practice.statement: A square with side length $10$ is shaded as shown in the figure. Point $E$ is the midpoint of $BC$, and $F$ is the midpoint of $CD$. What is the area of the shaded region?

practice.name: Problem 17 (2026 AMC 8)
practice.statement: How many three-digit positive integers have the property that the product of their digits is a prime number?

practice.name: Problem 20 (2026 AMC 8)
practice.statement: What is the remainder when $3^{2026}$ is divided by $10$?

practice.name: Problem 25 (2026 AMC 8)
practice.statement: Two points are chosen independently and uniformly at random on the boundary of a circle. What is the probability that the distance between the two points is at least the radius of the circle?
